label: Display Note
data_entry_hint: Prefix the string with "Danger:", "Info:", "Tip:", or "Warning:" to specify the type of note.
test_fixture_example: Danger: This text will be displayed in a red box|Info: This text will be displayed in a blue box

label: Geometry
data_entry_hint: WKT - An ENVELOPE, POLYGON, or MULTIPOLYGON value. Use ENVELOPE(-180,180,90,-90) for a whole earth geometry.

label: Bounding Box
data_entry_hint: W,S,E,N - A centroid will be derived from this value.
